rationale.R1.2: The opening claim ('uniform-state-of-the-art F1 scores across all benchmark datasets') is directly contradicted by the reported numbers: SMAP (0.79 vs prior SOTA 0.83) and WADI (0.74 vs prior SOTA 0.78) are regressions, not improvements. This internal contradiction is the most structurally salient issue regardless of what review flavor is intended.
